extDescription.message: A companion for supported web-based digital identity wallets. Adds cross-browser credential sharing, wallet switching, and seamless site compatibility.

errorNoWallets.description: Error when no wallet providers are configured

errorUserCancelled.description: Error when user cancels the wallet selection

errorWalletTimeout.description: Error when wallet does not respond within timeout

errorPopupBlocked.description: Error when browser blocks the wallet popup window

selectWalletModalTitle.description: Title of the wallet selection modal

selectWalletModalDescription.message: Choose which wallet to use for this credential request
selectWalletModalDescription.description: Description text in the wallet selection modal

selectWalletModalUseBrowserWallet.description: Button to use the browser's built-in wallet

registerWalletModalTitle.description: Title of the register wallet consent modal

registerWalletModalDescription.message: Wallet Companion has received a request to register a new wallet.
registerWalletModalDescription.description: Description text in the register wallet consent modal

registerWalletModalInfo.message: By allowing this, the wallet will be able to interact with Wallet Companion.
registerWalletModalInfo.description: Info text explaining the consequences of registration

emptyStateTitle.description: Title when no wallets are configured

emptyStateHint.message: Use the extension settings to add wallet providers
emptyStateHint.description: Hint text when no wallets are configured

popupNoWallets.description: Message shown in the popup when no wallets exist

walletDefaultDescription.description: Default description for a wallet that has no description

popupNoWalletsHint.message: Click "Add or Configure" to add one.
popupNoWalletsHint.description: Hint shown below the no-wallets message in popup
